title: sanguisorba × kishinamii
intro: Sanguisorba × kishinamii, also known as the Kishinami burnet, is a hybrid plant species within the rose family, specifically a cross between Sanguisorba menziesii and Sanguisorba tenuifolia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Sanguisorba × kishinamii include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential remedy for minor cuts and burns. Sanguisorba × kishinamii can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
